Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Endross]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Endross is a group or type of person whose leather uniform is worn by a bald man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Endross is a place where storms are born and is described as a blasted desert wasteland.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Endross is a Territory described as a vast desert wasteland with occasional lush jungle oases.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Endross is characterized by daily thunderstorms with lightning and harsh wind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Endross is a location inhabited by Travelers.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Endross Travelers can summon Gates that look like rolling thunderstorms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Endross individuals are considered dangerously unpredictable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Endross is a Grandmaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Endross creatures almost always consider the kush'da'rosh to be the strongest creature around.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Endross Travelers have storms swirling around their hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Endross is associated with a huge flying snake corpse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Endross is one of the four Incarnations identified by Indirial.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Endross will fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Endross is an unsophisticated beast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Endross is a place Simon has forayed into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 7''' — Endross contains formidable guardians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Endross is one of the Grandmasters who was not spiked on the city gates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Endross blew up a mining outpost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Elysian Incarnation has recruited sixteen Endross Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Endross is an Incarnation who has tried to kill Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Endross Incarnation kneels to King Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Endross's wings are formed of black stormclouds flashing with heat lightning.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
